examples: Objective: To study the diagnostic value of bone marrow scintigraphy in detecting malignant tumor metastasis.
The present study demonstrated that the radioactive labelled VIP is a promosing agent for tumor VIP receptor scintigraphy.
Thallium-201 myocardial perfusion scintigraphy was performed in 46 patients with coronary artery disease and 12 normal control subjects.
